(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const EPC_entity Entity)
(declare-const EPC_series Series)
(declare-const EPC_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const EPC_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of EPC_entity) "EPC ()"))
(assert (attr EPC_series EPC_entity))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 0.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 0.2) 0.0))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 0.3) 2.3))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 0.4) 2.7))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 0.5) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 0.8) 3.0))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= EPC_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= EPC_is_dec_bool false))
(assert (= max_val 3.1))
(assert (= min_val 0.0))
(assert (= target_val 3.1))
(assert (= cond_bool false))
(assert (= temp_real_1 0.4))
(assert (= temp_real_2 0.5))
(assert (= temp_real_3 0.8))
(assert (= temp_bool_1 true))
(assert (= temp_bool_2 true))
(assert (= rank1_entity EPC_entity))
(assert (= AnsString (name_of rank1_entity)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsString))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const EPC_entity Entity)
(declare-const EPC_series Series)
(declare-const EPC_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const EPC_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of EPC_entity) "EPC ()"))
(assert (attr EPC_series EPC_entity))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 0.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 1.0) 2.5))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 2.0) 2.8))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 3.0) 2.9))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 4.0) 3.0))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 5.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 6.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 7.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 8.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 9.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 10.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 15.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 20.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 25.0) 3.1))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 30.0) 3.1))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= max_val (f EPC_series 30.0)))
(assert (= min_val (f EPC_series 0.0)))
(assert (= target_val (* (diff max_val min_val) 0.0)))
(assert (= cond_bool (is_gt EPC_series EPC_series 0.0)))
(assert (= temp_real_1 (* (+ 0.0 target_val) (/ 0.0 0.0))))
(assert (= temp_real_2 (* (+ 0.0 target_val) (/ 0.0 0.0))))
(assert (= temp_real_3 (* (+ 0.0 target_val) (/ 0.0 0.0))))
(assert (= temp_bool_1 (is_gt EPC_series EPC_series 0.0)))
(assert (= temp_bool_2 (is_gt EPC_series EPC_series 3.0)))
(assert (= temp_bool_2 (is_gt EPC_series EPC_series 3.0)))
(assert (= AnsString (ite (>= (f EPC_series 4.0) (* (f EPC_series 30.0) 0.0)) (name_of EPC_entity) (name_of EPC_entity))))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsString))
(exit)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS

(declare-sort Entity 0)

(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value

;; Returns the string name of an Entity

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES

(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS

(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute

;; Returns the string name of an Entity

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const v_10W_entity Entity)
(declare-const v_10W_series Series)
(declare-const v_10W_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const v_10W_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const v_15W_entity Entity)
(declare-const v_15W_series Series)
(declare-const v_15W_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const v_15W_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const v_25W_entity Entity)
(declare-const v_25W_series Series)
(declare-const v_25W_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const v_25W_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(declare-const rank2_entity Entity)
(declare-const rank3_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of v_10W_entity) "10 W (%)"))
(assert (attr v_10W_series v_10W_entity))
(assert (= (name_of v_15W_entity) "15 W (%)"))
(assert (attr v_15W_series v_15W_entity))
(assert (= (name_of v_25W_entity) "25 W (%)"))
(assert (attr v_25W_series v_25W_entity))
(assert (= (f v_10W_series 10.0) 4.0))
(assert (= (f v_15W_series 10.0) 5.0))
(assert (= (f v_25W_series 10.0) 10.0))
(assert (= (f v_10W_series 20.0) 10.0))
(assert (= (f v_15W_series 20.0) 11.0))
(assert (= (f v_25W_series 20.0) 15.0))
(assert (= (f v_10W_series 30.0) 12.0))
(assert (= (f v_15W_series 30.0) 12.0))
(assert (= (f v_25W_series 30.0) 17.0))
(assert (= (f v_10W_series 45.0) 12.0))
(assert (= (f v_15W_series 45.0) 12.0))
(assert (= (f v_25W_series 45.0) 21.0))
(assert (= (f v_10W_series 60.0) 12.0))
(assert (= (f v_15W_series 60.0) 13.0))
(assert (= (f v_25W_series 60.0) 23.0))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= v_10W_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= v_15W_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= v_25W_is_inc_bool true))
(assert (= v_10W_is_dec_bool false))
(assert (= v_15W_is_dec_bool false))
(assert (= v_25W_is_dec_bool false))
(assert (= cond_bool false))
(assert (= AnsBool cond_bool))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const EstimatedTiOthi_entity Entity)
(declare-const EstimatedTiOthi_series Series)
(declare-const EstimatedTiOthi_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const EstimatedTiOthi_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const Etchpercyclenmc_entity Entity)
(declare-const Etchpercyclenmc_series Series)
(declare-const Etchpercyclenmc_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const Etchpercyclenmc_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(declare-const rank2_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of EstimatedTiOthi_entity) "Estimated TiO thickness (nm)"))
(assert (attr EstimatedTiOthi_series EstimatedTiOthi_entity))
(assert (= (name_of Etchpercyclenmc_entity) "Etch per cycle (nm/cycle)"))
(assert (attr Etchpercyclenmc_series Etchpercyclenmc_entity))
(assert (= (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 10.0) 0.3))
(assert (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 10.0) 0.2))
(assert (= (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 15.0) 0.5))
(assert (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 15.0) 0.4))
(assert (= (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 25.0) 0.9))
(assert (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 25.0) 0.8))
(assert (= (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 50.0) 1.9))
(assert (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 50.0) 1.7))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= cond_bool (or (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 10.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 10.0)) (> (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 10.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 10.0)))))
(assert (= cond_bool (or (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 15.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 15.0)) (> (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 15.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 15.0)))))
(assert (= cond_bool (or (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 25.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 25.0)) (> (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 25.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 25.0)))))
(assert (= cond_bool (or (= (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 50.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 50.0)) (> (f Etchpercyclenmc_series 50.0) (f EstimatedTiOthi_series 50.0)))))
(assert (= AnsBool cond_bool))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute

;; Returns the string name of an Entity

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const Intensitycs_entity Entity)
(declare-const Intensitycs_series Series)
(declare-const Intensitycs_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const Intensitycs_is_dec_bool Bool)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const MassChangengcm_entity Entity)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_series Series)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of MassChangengcm_entity) "Mass Change (ng/cm)"))
(assert (attr MassChangengcm_series MassChangengcm_entity))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 150.0) 0.0175))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 200.0) 0.018))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 250.0) 0.0185))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 300.0) 0.019))

(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 400.0) 0.02))

(assert (= AnsBool (ite (= MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool true) false true)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const EPC_entity Entity)
(declare-const EPC_series Series)
(declare-const EPC_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const EPC_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of EPC_entity) "EPC ()"))
(assert (attr EPC_series EPC_entity))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 200.0) 0.05))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 250.0) 0.25))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 300.0) 1.25))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 350.0) 2.6))
(assert (= (f EPC_series 400.0) 3.9))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= temp_real_1 200.0))
(assert (= temp_real_2 250.0))
(assert (= temp_real_3 300.0))
(assert (= cond_bool (or (> (f EPC_series temp_real_1) 0.0) (> (f EPC_series temp_real_2) 0.0))))
(assert (= AnsBool cond_bool))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---

(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of Resistivitycm_entity) "Resistivity (cm)"))
(assert (attr Resistivitycm_series Resistivitycm_entity))
(assert (= (f Resistivitycm_series 5.0) 33.0))

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const Ranm_entity Entity)
(declare-const Ranm_series Series)
(declare-const Ranm_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const Ranm_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of Ranm_entity) "Ra (nm)"))
(assert (attr Ranm_series Ranm_entity))
(assert (= (f Ranm_series 0.0) 3.3))
(assert (= (f Ranm_series 25.0) 3.0))
(assert (= (f Ranm_series 50.0) 3.5))
(assert (= (f Ranm_series 100.0) 3.5))
(assert (= (f Ranm_series 200.0) 4.2))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= temp_real_1 (f Ranm_series 200.0)))
(assert (= temp_real_2 (f Ranm_series 0.0)))
(assert (= Ranm_is_inc_bool (> temp_real_1 temp_real_2)))
(assert (= AnsBool Ranm_is_inc_bool))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const Distance_entity Entity)
(declare-const Distance_series Series)
(declare-const Distance_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const Distance_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of Distance_entity) "Distance ()"))
(assert (attr Distance_series Distance_entity))
(assert (= (f Distance_series 0.0) 2.48))
(assert (= (f Distance_series 1.0) 1.83))
(assert (= (f Distance_series 2.0) 1.5))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---

(assert (= max_val (f Distance_series 0.0)))
(assert (= AnsBool (> max_val 0.0)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const MassChangengcm_entity Entity)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_series Series)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of MassChangengcm_entity) "Mass Change (ng/cm)"))
(assert (attr MassChangengcm_series MassChangengcm_entity))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 0.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 2000.0) -500.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 4000.0) -1000.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 6000.0) -1500.0))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= cond_bool false))
(assert (= AnsBool (= 1.0 0.0)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const EnergyeV_entity Entity)
(declare-const EnergyeV_series Series)
(declare-const EnergyeV_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const EnergyeV_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of EnergyeV_entity) "Energy (eV)"))
(assert (attr EnergyeV_series EnergyeV_entity))
(assert (= (f EnergyeV_series 0.0) 0.0))

(assert (= (f EnergyeV_series 2.0) -1.51))

  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2

  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const NumberofCuacac_entity Entity)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)
